hooks.command: input=$(cat); skill=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.skill // empty'); if [ "$skill" = "wrap" ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "The wrap skill is yours to invoke — type /wrap yourself."}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bsed\b'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "sed is banned — it destroyed days of work. Use the Edit tool instead."}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(echo|printf|cat)\s[^|]*>'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Direct file writes via Bash are banned. Use the Write or Edit tool instead."}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (reset --hard|push --force|push -f|rebase -i)'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Destructive git command blocked. Run it yourself if you mean it."}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'doing\.md'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "doing.md cannot be touched directly. Use the doing CLI."}'; fi
